translation_notes: Signal requires 14-day price decline and low volume over 20-day lookback. Translated price decline >= 3% using returns < -0.03 (14-day return). Volume condition uses vol_ratio_20 (current volume vs 20-day average) as proxy for the 60th percentile threshold. Exit on 10% gain uses returns >= 0.10; stop-loss at -5% uses close relative to entry. Hold max 10 trading days enforced via hold_days_max parameter.
validation_issues: exit_long: impossible condition 'close < -0.05' is always false
